# PDF.js generic viewer

Source: `https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js/releases/download/v6.1.200/pdfjs-6.1.200-dist.zip`

Release: `v6.1.200`

Archive SHA-256: `9e1584d768ed099aa4be27ea423f89a038c2005f1ee417ea4f35ba4591ec1846`

This directory is the unmodified upstream generic viewer application and its runtime
assets. Source maps, the sample PDF, and debugger-only files are intentionally absent
from the extension package.
